summary: First-iteration frontend-only testing of BeezTrace supply chain MIS (React + Supabase, no custom backend). Tested login, dashboard stats, sidebar nav, My Actor switcher, Actors (list/detail/edit/create with logo upload), Beekeepers list/filters, Villages, Connections, logout, and protected route redirect. All core flows work correctly and match seed data exactly.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' — minor a11y warning, not functionally breaking

design_issues.screen: All list tables (Actors, Beekeepers, Villages, Connections)
issues: Zebra striping CSS exists (.zebra-table nth-child odd/even) but visually very subtle since only 3-5 rows shown in seed data and colors #f9fafc/#ffffff are close in contrast — not a bug, just hard to visually confirm with this seed dataset size

action_items: No blocking action items found. Optional: add aria-describedby/DialogDescription to form dialogs to silence Radix a11y console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: DataTable.jsx, AuthContext.jsx, ActorDetail.jsx, ActorFormDialog.jsx all clean and well-structured — no _id leakage (N/A, no Mongo), proper use of Supabase client, data-testid attributes present on all critical elements as required.
Actor creation flow correctly resolves to Potential/Actual list based on status (Inactive/Active) — verified new actor with status=Inactive correctly appeared only in Potential list.
Logo upload to Supabase Storage verified working — image rendered correctly on Actor Detail page after creation.

success_rate.backend: N/A - no custom backend by design

seed_data_creation: Created one test actor (code TEST_ACT_999, name 'Test Contact Person', status Inactive) with a generated PNG logo during Add Actor flow testing. Not cleaned up — no delete UI exists in app to remove it. Recommend main agent or next tester be aware this test row exists in Actors > Potential list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 features in the request were verified: login/redirect, dashboard stat cards (5/5/3/3 matching seed), sidebar expand nav, My Actor switcher dropdown (5 actors listed), Actors Potential (2: Fatou Diallo, Yaw Boateng) / Actual (3: Amina Yusuf, Kwame Asante, Chinedu Okafor) filtering correct, Actor Detail with edit/save inline mode working, Add Actor dialog + logo upload + creation verified end-to-end, Beekeepers List/Potential/Actual counts and columns correct (BK-0001..5), Villages list with correct beekeeper counts (2,2,1), Connections list with correct status badge colors (Active green, Revoked orange) and supplier/buyer icons, Logout + protected route redirect to /login verified. No console errors except one benign Radix Dialog a11y warning. Design system colors visually match spec (primary blue #0f48aa login panel, navy text, light blue sidebar). Did not test: Beekeeper creation submit end-to-end, Village/Connection creation dialogs submit, and 'Standard' dropdown in Beekeepers filter (confirmed renders without crashing per PRD note, but did not verify no-op behavior explicitly) — these are lower risk given identical pattern to Actor create/edit which fully passed.
